---
title: "Untitled"
editor: visual
---
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<style>
    body {
        font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif;
        line-height: 1.6;
        color: #333;
        max-width: 1200px;
        margin: 0 auto;
        padding: 2rem;
    }

    h1 {
        color: #00d4ff;
        font-size: 2.5rem;
        margin-bottom: 2rem;
    }

    h2 {
        color: #2c5364;
        font-size: 2rem;
        margin-top: 3rem;
        margin-bottom: 2rem;
        position: relative;
        padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    h2::after {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        bottom: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 60px;
        height: 3px;
        background: linear-gradient(to right, #00d4ff, #7b2ff7);
        border-radius: 2px;
    }

    .about-section {
        margin-bottom: 3rem;
        padding: 2rem;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02);
        border-radius: 10px;
        border-left: 4px solid transparent;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .about-section:hover {
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
        border-left-color: #00d4ff;
    }

    /* Career Timeline */
    .timeline {
        position: relative;
        padding: 2rem 0;
        margin: 3rem 0;
    }

    .timeline::before {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        width: 4px;
        height: 100%;
        background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #00d4ff, #7b2ff7);
    }

    .timeline-item {
        position: relative;
        margin-bottom: 3rem;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
    }

    .timeline-item:nth-child(odd) {
        flex-direction: row;
    }

    .timeline-item:nth-child(even) {
        flex-direction: row-reverse;
    }

    .timeline-content {
        width: 45%;
        padding: 1.5rem;
        background: white;
        border-radius: 10px;
        box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
        position: relative;
        transition: all 0.4s ease;
        overflow: hidden;
    }

    .timeline-content:hover {
        transform: scale(1.08);
        background: #f8f9fa;
        border-color: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.8);
        box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,212,255,0.3);
        z-index: 100;
    }

    .timeline-details {
        max-height: 0;
        opacity: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        transition: max-height 0.4s ease, opacity 0.4s ease, margin-top 0.4s ease;
        margin-top: 0;
    }

    .timeline-content:hover .timeline-details {
        max-height: 500px;
        opacity: 1;
        margin-top: 1rem;
    }

    .timeline-details ul {
        list-style: none;
        padding: 0;
        margin: 0;
    }

    .timeline-details li {
        padding: 0.5rem 0 0.5rem 1.5rem;
        position: relative;
        color: #555;
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        line-height: 1.5;
    }

    .timeline-details li::before {
        content: '▹';
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        color: #00d4ff;
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    .timeline-achievements {
        margin-top: 0.8rem;
        padding-top: 0.8rem;
        border-top: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
    }

    .timeline-achievements strong {
        color: #00d4ff;
        font-size: 0.95rem;
    }

    .timeline-item:nth-child(odd) .timeline-content {
        margin-right: auto;
    }

    .timeline-item:nth-child(even) .timeline-content {
        margin-left: auto;
    }

    .timeline-dot {
        position: absolute;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translateX(-50%);
        width: 20px;
        height: 20px;
        background: #00d4ff;
        border: 4px solid white;
        border-radius: 50%;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(0,212,255,0.2);
        z-index: 10;
    }

    .timeline-year {
        font-size: 1.2rem;
        font-weight: 700;
        color: #00d4ff;
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .timeline-title {
        font-size: 1.3rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: #2c5364;
        margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    }

    .timeline-company {
        font-size: 1rem;
        color: #666;
        font-style: italic;
        margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
    }

    .timeline-description {
        color: #555;
        line-height: 1.6;
        font-size: 0.95rem;
    }

    .skill-item {
        display: inline-block;
        margin: 0.5rem;
        padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
        background: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.1);
        border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
        border-radius: 20px;
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .skill-item:hover {
        background: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
        border-color: #00d4ff;
        transform: translateY(-3px);
        box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.3);
    }

    /* Current Role Expandable */
    .role-card {
        background: white;
        padding: 2rem;
        border-radius: 10px;
        box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        border: 1px solid rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.2);
        margin: 1rem 0;
        transition: all 0.4s ease;
        cursor: pointer;
        position: relative;
    }

    .role-card:hover {
        transform: scale(1.03);
        background: #f8f9fa;
        border-color: rgba(0, 212, 255, 0.8);
        box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(0,212,255,0.3);
    }

    .role-header {
        display: flex;
        justify-content: space-between;
        align-items: center;
    }

    .role-title {
        font-size: 1.3rem;
        font-weight: 600;
        color: #00d4ff;
    }

    .expand-icon {
        font-size: 1.5rem;
        color: #00d4ff;
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
    }

    .role-card:hover .expand-icon {
        transform: rotate(90deg);
    }

    .role-responsibilities {
        max-height: 0;
        opacity: 0;
        overflow: hidden;
        transition: max-height 0.4s ease, opacity 0.4s ease, margin-top 0.4s ease;
        margin-top: 0;
    }

    .role-card:hover .role-responsibilities {
        max-height: 600px;
        opacity: 1;
        margin-top: 1.5rem;
    }

    .role-responsibilities ul {
        list-style: none;
        padding: 0;
        margin: 0;
    }

    .role-responsibilities li {
        padding: 0.7rem 0 0.7rem 1.5rem;
        position: relative;
        color: #555;
        font-size: 0.95rem;
        line-height: 1.6;
    }

    .role-responsibilities li::before {
        content: '▹';
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        color: #00d4ff;
        font-weight: bold;
        font-size: 1.2rem;
    }

    .role-brief {
        color: #666;
        font-size: 1rem;
        margin-top: 0.5rem;
        line-height: 1.6;
    }

    .custom-hr {
        border: none;
        height: 2px;
        background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #00d4ff, transparent);
        margin: 3rem 0;
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .timeline::before {
            left: 20px;
        }

        .timeline-item {
            flex-direction: column !important;
            align-items: flex-start;
        }

        .timeline-content {
            width: calc(100% - 60px);
            margin-left: 60px !important;
            margin-right: 0 !important;
        }

        .timeline-dot {
            left: 20px;
        }
    }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<h1>About</h1>

<div class="about-section">
    <h2>Current Role</h2>
    
    <div class="role-card">
        <div class="role-header">
            <div class="role-title">Product Manager - Biomarker Module Development</div>
            <div class="expand-icon">▶</div>
        </div>
        <div class="role-brief">
            Leading development of biomarker modules for omics research, working at the intersection of computational biology and AI-driven drug discovery.
        </div>
        <div class="role-responsibilities">
            <strong style="color: #00d4ff; font-size: 1.05rem;">Key Responsibilities:</strong>
            <ul>
                <li>Spearheading biomarker module development and integration across multiple research platforms</li>
                <li>Extracting and curating data from public databases using advanced LLM models (Llama and Gemini)</li>
                <li>Implementing scripting-based approaches to streamline data curation workflows</li>
                <li>Contributing to cross-functional module development by incorporating biomarkers as key features</li>
                <li>Optimizing LLM prompts and evaluating model accuracy to enhance AI/ML pipeline performance</li>
                <li>Collaborating closely with data engineers and data scientists to build innovative solutions</li>
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="custom-hr"></div>

<h2>Professional Experience</h2>

<div class="timeline">
    <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-content">
            <div class="timeline-year">2024 - Present</div>
            <div class="timeline-title">Product Manager - Biomarker Module</div>
            <div class="timeline-company">Pune, India</div>
            <div class="timeline-description">
                Leading development of biomarker modules for omics research. Collaborating with data engineers and scientists to integrate AI/ML approaches.
            </div>
            <div class="timeline-details">
                <ul>
                    <li>Spearheading biomarker module development and integration across multiple research platforms</li>
                    <li>Utilizing LLM models (Llama, Gemini) for automated data extraction from public databases</li>
                    <li>Implementing scripting-based approaches to streamline data curation workflows</li>
                    <li>Optimizing LLM prompts and evaluating model accuracy to enhance AI/ML pipeline performance</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-content">
            <div class="timeline-year">2022 - 2024</div>
            <div class="timeline-title">Associate Scientific Manager</div>
            <div class="timeline-company">Pune, India</div>
            <div class="timeline-description">
                Led data curation for AI/ML-powered drug discovery modules in an agile, cross-functional environment.
            </div>
            <div class="timeline-details">
                <div class="timeline-achievements">
                    <strong>Key Achievements:</strong>
                    <ul>
                        <li>Enhanced LLM model performance through strategic prompt optimization and accuracy evaluation</li>
                        <li>Streamlined data curation processes for multiple AI/ML modules</li>
                        <li>Bridged the gap between scientific expertise and technical implementation</li>
                        <li>Collaborated with product managers, data engineers, and data scientists</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-content">
            <div class="timeline-year">2019 - 2022</div>
            <div class="timeline-title">Associate Biomedical Scientist</div>
            <div class="timeline-company">Precision Biomarker Laboratories, Cedars-Sinai Medical Center, Los Angeles, CA</div>
            <div class="timeline-description">
                Conducted R&D in clinical proteomics and biomarker discovery, driving improvements in laboratory workflows.
            </div>
            <div class="timeline-details">
                <div class="timeline-achievements">
                    <strong>Key Achievements:</strong>
                    <ul>
                        <li>Developed novel PTMomics platforms for post-translational modification analysis</li>
                        <li>Supervised laboratory technicians and managed end-to-end project delivery</li>
                        <li>Improved existing workflows through collaborative innovation</li>
                        <li>Led study execution, report compilation, and stakeholder presentations</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-content">
            <div class="timeline-year">2017 - 2019</div>
            <div class="timeline-title">Postdoctoral Fellow</div>
            <div class="timeline-company">University of Southern Denmark</div>
            <div class="timeline-description">
                Developed comprehensive pipeline for identifying post-translationally modified biomarkers in clinical samples.
            </div>
            <div class="timeline-details">
                <ul>
                    <li>Worked with Prof. Martin R. Larsen on cutting-edge proteomics research</li>
                    <li>Advanced the field of clinical proteomics through innovative methodologies</li>
                    <li>Published research in high-impact scientific journals</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="custom-hr"></div>

<h2>Education</h2>

<div class="timeline">
    <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-content">
            <div class="timeline-year">2012 - 2017</div>
            <div class="timeline-title">PhD in Biochemistry</div>
            <div class="timeline-company">University of Turku, Finland</div>
            <div class="timeline-description">
                Conducted research under Prof. Riitta Lahesmaa and Dr. Robert Moulder focusing on proteomics applications in clinical research.
            </div>
            <div class="timeline-details">
                <div class="timeline-achievements">
                    <strong>Research Focus:</strong>
                    <ul>
                        <li>Identified and validated serum protein biomarkers for Type 1 diabetes</li>
                        <li>Investigated protein biomarkers for carotid atherosclerosis</li>
                        <li>Applied mass spectrometry-based proteomics to clinical samples</li>
                        <li>Developed computational methods for biomarker validation</li>
                    </ul>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-content">
            <div class="timeline-year">2010 - 2012</div>
            <div class="timeline-title">Master's Degree</div>
            <div class="timeline-company">National Chemical Laboratory (NCL), India</div>
            <div class="timeline-description">
                Completed master's thesis in proteomics and mass spectrometry, establishing foundation for research career.
            </div>
            <div class="timeline-details">
                <ul>
                    <li>Worked under joint supervision of Drs. Mahesh J. Kulkarni and B. Santhakumari</li>
                    <li>Gained expertise in advanced proteomics techniques</li>
                    <li>Published research findings in peer-reviewed journals</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="timeline-item">
        <div class="timeline-content">
            <div class="timeline-year">Bachelor's</div>
            <div class="timeline-title">Pharmacy Degree</div>
            <div class="timeline-company">India</div>
            <div class="timeline-description">
                Pharmacist by training, providing strong foundation in pharmaceutical sciences.
            </div>
            <div class="timeline-details">
                <ul>
                    <li>Strong foundation in pharmaceutical sciences and drug development principles</li>
                    <li>Comprehensive understanding of medicinal chemistry and pharmacology</li>
                </ul>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="custom-hr"></div>

<div class="about-section">
    <h2>Expertise</h2>
    
    <p><strong>Technical Skills:</strong></p>
    <div style="margin: 1.5rem 0;">
        <span class="skill-item">Mass Spectrometry Proteomics</span>
        <span class="skill-item">PTM Analysis</span>
        <span class="skill-item">Biomarker Discovery</span>
        <span class="skill-item">Large Language Models</span>
        <span class="skill-item">AI/ML Pipeline</span>
        <span class="skill-item">Data Curation</span>
        <span class="skill-item">Computational Biology</span>
        <span class="skill-item">Omics Analysis</span>
    </div>

    <p><strong>Professional Skills:</strong></p>
    <div style="margin: 1.5rem 0;">
        <span class="skill-item">Product Management</span>
        <span class="skill-item">Cross-functional Collaboration</span>
        <span class="skill-item">Project Leadership</span>
        <span class="skill-item">Agile Methodology</span>
        <span class="skill-item">Scientific Communication</span>
        <span class="skill-item">Prompt Engineering</span>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="custom-hr"></div>

<div class="about-section">
    <h2>Career Journey</h2>
    <p>My career represents a unique evolution from bench scientist to AI-driven drug discovery leader. Starting with hands-on proteomics research during my PhD and postdoc, I developed deep expertise in mass spectrometry, biomarker discovery, and computational analysis.</p>
    
    <p>At Cedars-Sinai Medical Center, I translated this research expertise into clinical applications, developing new platforms and improving laboratory workflows.</p>
    
    <p>Today, I leverage this scientific foundation to lead biomarker module development, integrating cutting-edge AI/ML technologies with proteomics knowledge to accelerate drug discovery. This journey has equipped me with a rare combination of deep scientific expertise and practical AI/ML implementation skills, positioning me at the forefront of computational biology and pharmaceutical innovation.</p>
</div>

</body>
</html>
